topBanner.underConstruction: Site under construction — we appreciate constructive feedback!

home.subtitle: We connect quality, create value, measure and promote the effects of ecosystem stakeholders on the international stage. We encourage systemic and complementary thinking to raise quality and accessibility.
home.esgDescription: <0>ESG</0> stands for three pillars of sustainable development: <2>E</2>nvironmental, <4>S</4>ocial, and <6>G</6>overnance. It's not compliance or a report — it's a way of thinking about business that generates value for all stakeholders.
home.environmentDesc: Climate, resources, renewable energy, carbon footprint
home.sImpactDesc: In our ecosystem, 'S' is not an add-on — it's the heart of the entire system. S-Impact means measurable, documented social impact. We use tokenization and distributed digital records as mathematical proof of real social actions — eliminating social-washing and building trust based on facts.
home.sImpactBullet1: We support neurodiversity, women in business, and innovators excluded by the system
home.sImpactBullet2: We build intergenerational bridges — children and grandparents learn together
home.sImpactBullet3: Every social action is tokenized — immutably recorded and verifiable
home.sImpactBullet4: We promote the Polish brand internationally through ethical business
home.womenOnBoardsDesc: — a Constellation.love project supporting women on their way to boards and supervisory councils. Measurable social impact: tokenized mentoring, transparent development paths, real progress data.
home.sdg8and10: Goal 8: Decent Work and Economic Growth
home.successQuote: "At Constellation.love, we don't measure success by position, status, or results alone. Equal doesn't mean fair. The true value of a person and project is shown by how many obstacles they had to overcome along the way, and whether they did it without losing their moral backbone."
home.adaMargoRole: Sustainable business practitioner, educator, entrepreneur · Intrapreneur & Interim Manager · Co-creator of an ecosystem based on systems thinking, the Dune Effect, and Fractal Economy · Coach with 20 years of experience · Writer, publicist, and innovator
home.successDescription: In a world where 'success' is defined by titles, wealth, and rankings, we forget what truly builds value: resilience, perseverance, and the ability to rise after failures. A true ESG leader is not someone who had an easy path — it's someone who, despite obstacles, didn't lose their ethics, didn't abandon their values, and never stopped helping others.
home.fairNotEqualDesc: Investing in neurodiverse and disabled individuals is not just ethics — it's an economic growth strategy. Just create an environment where people who have it harder can thrive. It's not about giving everyone the same thing — it's about giving everyone what they need to contribute maximum value. That's the justice that drives innovation and builds real competitive advantage.
home.norwayContest: Tell us why you think so — and win a weekend in Norway!
home.norwayContestDesc: Share your definition of success in the context of ESG and ethics. The best answer wins an exclusive weekend at a hotel-coworking space between Oslo and Bergen (Kongsvegen). Space for work, nature, and inspiration.
home.wobDescription: You identify as a woman. You want a great career. Join Women on Boards — training for board members, mentoring, and a community of women changing business.
home.wobNote: * Project aligned with ESG doctrine with S-Impact focus
home.konstelacjaDesc: Our foundation's mission is to promote the Polish brand on the international stage. We build intergenerational bridges, showcase the potential in neurodiversity. We create innovative business models for quality improvement and economic growth. We develop tools for faster implementation of the 17 SDGs and operate with S-Impact focus in ESG areas.
home.workshopsTitle: We'll lead entrepreneurship workshops for your team
home.workshopsDesc: The Constellation.love team has been building an innovation ecosystem for over a decade. We conduct workshops on implementing business tools, entrepreneurship case studies, and anti-crisis strategies. For directors, managers, and teams that want to grow.
home.schoolTitle: Let's develop entrepreneurship in Polish schools together
home.schoolDesc1: Principal — we'd be happy to share a ready-made entrepreneurship workshop program, customize it for your school's needs, and prepare measurable outcome indicators. Together, we'll show that education and business can go hand in hand.
home.schoolDesc2: Principal, Librus is not a barrier to developing entrepreneurship among children. We have support from the Ministry of Development and Technology. Entrepreneurship workshops can be conducted by invitation alongside a full-time employed teacher.
home.schoolDesc3: Call and schedule workshops. Every school subject can be taught so that children understand how to monetize that knowledge. The alternative is to organize additional hours.
home.schoolCta: Write to me — I'll share the program
home.readyProgramDesc: Proven workshop program ready to implement in your school
home.kpiResultsDesc: Prepared KPIs and measurable results for reporting and evaluation
home.leaderPromotionDesc: We'll promote principals who build entrepreneurship in Poland

hero.description: Irrefutable digital proof of invention existence at the pre-patent stage. A shield that works before theft — not after.
hero.elevatorPitch: — a self-sufficient ecosystem where the investor is also the client, and complementary projects exchange value without intermediaries.
